Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Continued To Dec-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on December 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the final inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
